channel.title: Comments for page "The Voyage"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Voyage"

item.title: Tale Sequel!
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for reading the second installment in the WHAC canon, the first can be found here. Much thanks to the #writing-help channel on SCPDeclassified. We have nothing left to lose but our astral chains.

I was originally going to post this on August 8th when the contest was over but I'm posting prematurely because disciplinary reasons might soon prevent it. It's completely done though, don't take that as an excuse or anything.
